text.tspan: NETFLIX SIMIAN ARMY (the OG chaos toolkit)
Each 'monkey' simulates a specific real-world failure mode.
BEYOND NETFLIX: every major cloud / SRE org now does some form of this:
Google DiRT (Disaster Recovery Testing), AWS Fault Injection Service,
Azure Chaos Studio, GCP Chaos Toolkit, LinkedIn Waterbear, Gremlin (vendor),
Litmus (CNCF), Chaos Mesh (CNCF), Pumba (Docker chaos), Toxiproxy (network)
